help.title: Help & Support
help.description: Need assistance with your claim or have questions about our services? Reach out to our team.

contact.title: Contact Support
contact.description: Our team is available Monday to Friday, 9:00 - 17:00.

request.title: Ask staff for help
request.description: Send a support request to the staff receiving queue. We attach your member context and optional claim link server-side.
request.subject: What do you need help with?
request.created: Your request was sent to the staff support queue.
request.error: We could not send the request. Try again with a short subject and enough detail.

publicResponse.title: Staff update
publicResponse.acknowledgementError: We could not acknowledge this update. Try again.
publicResponse.acknowledgementStale: The support team just updated this response. Please review the latest update.

memberReply.label: Reply to staff
memberReply.placeholder: Let staff know whether this resolves your request or what you still need...
memberReply.error: We could not send your reply. Try again.
memberReply.stale: This support update changed. Please review the latest update before replying.
memberReply.alreadyReplied: You already replied to this update.
memberReply.tooLong: Reply must be 1,000 characters or fewer.

advisory.claimSpecific: You already have an active support request for this claim. You can still submit a new one.
advisory.genericActive: You have {count, plural, one {# active support request} other {# active support requests}}. You can still submit a new one.

q1.question: How long does a claim take?

q2.question: What documents do I need?
q2.answer: Proof of purchase, photos of damage, and incident report.

legal.title: Legal Resources
legal.consumerRightsDesc: Learn about your rights under current consumer protection laws.
